text:
Hi! - approved - please carry on! - Thanks!

  George

On Fri, Jan 05, 2007 at 05:10:48AM +0000, you wrote:

> Maintainer of mail/py-milter,
> 
> Please note that PR ports/107558 has just been submitted.
> 
> If it contains a patch for an upgrade, an enhancement or a bug fix
> you agree on, reply to this email stating that you approve the patch
> and a committer will take care of it.
> 
> The full text of the PR can be found at:
>     http://www.freebsd.org/cgi/query-pr.cgi?pr=ports/107558
> 
> -- 
> Edwin Groothuis
> edwin@FreeBSD.org
